mapper.sql: schedule_id, contest_id, stage_name, start_time, end_time, venue, description, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: select from jst_contest_schedule where schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from jst_contest_schedule where contest_id = #{contestId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, schedule_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_contest_schedule set stage_name = #{entity.stageName}, start_time = #{entity.startTime}, end_time = #{entity.endTime}, venue = #{entity.venue}, description = #{entity.description}, sort_order = #{entity.sortOrder}, update_by = #{entity.updateBy}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} where schedule_id = #{entity.scheduleId} and del_flag = '0'
